purpose: Validate Step 10O reports, materialized inputs, mask levels, and source immutability.
forbidden: Proceeding with missing, stale, or blocked upstream evidence.
expected_evidence: Validated upstream manifest and source diff check.

purpose: Create a fresh in-memory DiffSBDD model instance for the dry run.
expected_evidence: Model class, parameter count, and no-checkpoint flags.

purpose: Create a conservative optimizer for the in-memory model.
allowed: AdamW with reviewed learning rate and no weight decay.
forbidden: Trainer, Lightning loop, saved optimizer state.
expected_evidence: Optimizer class, learning rate, and weight decay logged.
failure_action: Abort if optimizer configuration differs from policy.

purpose: Use a deterministic A/B/B2/C cycle so every mask level is covered.
allowed: Fixed seed, no shuffle, tiny max step count.
forbidden: Random uncontrolled sampling for first dry run.
expected_evidence: Mask level per step and target/context counts.
failure_action: Abort on unexpected mask level or empty target mask.

purpose: Run only the explicitly capped number of dry-run steps.
allowed: Forward, masked loss, backward, optimizer step, metrics logging.
forbidden: Formal training, checkpoint writing, trainer.fit, training_step.
expected_evidence: One row per step with loss, gradient, and parameter delta metrics.
failure_action: Stop immediately on any failed invariant.

purpose: Record original and masked loss components for audit.
expected_evidence: Finite loss fields for every step.

purpose: Record gradient norm, max abs, finite checks, and NaN/Inf counts.
failure_action: Abort before optimizer step if gradients fail.

purpose: Record in-memory parameter delta after optimizer step.
forbidden: Saving model weights or optimizer state.
expected_evidence: Finite nonzero parameter delta and post-step finite parameters.
failure_action: Abort if update is zero or non-finite.

purpose: Apply hard stop conditions after every step.
expected_evidence: Stop reason and last safe step.
failure_action: Stop loop and write blocked report.

allowed: CSV report, JSON preview manifest, Markdown summary.
forbidden: Model files, checkpoint files, archives, tensor dumps.
failure_action: Delete disallowed outputs and mark blocked.

purpose: Confirm no checkpoint, model, tensor, or archive file was created.
allowed: Filesystem scan of dry-run output root.
failure_action: Mark blocked and remove forbidden outputs if any were created.

purpose: Confirm DiffSBDD, equivariant_diffusion, and lightning_modules are unchanged.
expected_evidence: No diff in protected source paths.
